title: Personal user - no tenant data in the mobile app
scenario: Guest user in Poly Studio Mobile app shows "None" for Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID, and "Unknown" for Last connected in Poly Lens Menu > Support > App
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Log in as Guest (personal user, no tenant).
3. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
4. Observe the displayed values for Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last connected.
6. Navigate back to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App and observe the values again.
expected: For a Guest user, the Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID should display appropriate values (e.g., "N/A" or blank) and Last connected should show a valid timestamp or "N/A" rather than "Unknown". Tapping "Later" should not alter these values.
